testCases: TC1: input { baseDamage:100, fireRate:2, weaponType:"physical", isCritical:false } → output { total: 200, breakdown: { baseDamage:100, fireRate:2, rawDPS:200, weaponType:"physical", weaponModifier:1, effectiveDPS:200, isCritical:false, critMultiplier:1, total:200 } }
TC2: input { baseDamage:150, fireRate:1.5, weaponType:"elemental", isCritical:false } → output { total: 270, breakdown: { ... } } // 150 * 1.5 * 1.2 = 270
TC3: input { baseDamage:80, fireRate:3, weaponType:"arcane", isCritical:false } → output { total: 360, breakdown: { ... } } // 80 * 3 * 1.5 = 360
TC4: input { baseDamage:120, fireRate:1, weaponType:"physical", isCritical:true } → output { total: 240, breakdown: { ... } } // 120 * 1 * 1 * 2 = 240
TC5: input { baseDamage:100, fireRate:2, weaponType:"elemental", isCritical:true } → output { total: 480, breakdown: { ... } } // 100 * 2 * 1.2 * 2 = 480

TC6: input { baseDamage:0, fireRate:100, weaponType:"physical", isCritical:false } → output { total: 0, breakdown: { baseDamage:0, fireRate:100, rawDPS:0, weaponType:"physical", weaponModifier:1, effectiveDPS:0, isCritical:false, critMultiplier:1, total:0 } }
TC7: input { baseDamage:100, fireRate:0, weaponType:"physical", isCritical:false } → output { total: 0, breakdown: { ... , rawDPS:0, total:0 } }
TC8: input { baseDamage:-5, fireRate:2, weaponType:"physical", isCritical:false } → output { error: "baseDamage must be >= 0" }
TC9: input { baseDamage:100, fireRate:-1, weaponType:"physical", isCritical:false } → output { error: "fireRate must be >= 0" }
TC10: input { baseDamage:100, fireRate:2, weaponType:"invalid", isCritical:false } → output { error: "Invalid weaponType. Allowed: physical, elemental, arcane" }
TC11: input { baseDamage:100, fireRate:2, weaponType:"ELEMENTAL", isCritical:false } → output { total: 240, breakdown: { weaponType:"elemental", ... } } // case-insensitive normalization
TC12: input { baseDamage:100, fireRate:2, weaponType:"Arcane", isCritical:true } → output { total: 600, breakdown: { ... } } // case-insensitive, crit
TC13: input { baseDamage:100, fireRate:2, weaponType:"physical", isCritical:"true" } → output { error: "isCritical must be a boolean" } // string bool rejected
TC14: input { baseDamage:"100", fireRate:2, weaponType:"physical", isCritical:false } → output { error: "baseDamage must be a number" } // string number rejected
TC15: input { baseDamage:NaN, fireRate:2, weaponType:"physical", isCritical:false } → output { error: "baseDamage must be a number" }
TC16: input { baseDamage:100, fireRate:2, weaponType:null, isCritical:false } → output { error: "weaponType must be a string" }
TC17: input { baseDamage:100, fireRate:2, weaponType:"", isCritical:false } → output { error: "Invalid weaponType. Allowed: physical, elemental, arcane" }
TC18: input { baseDamage:1e10, fireRate:1e10, weaponType:"arcane", isCritical:true } → output { total: 1.5e20, breakdown: { ... } } // stress test, no overflow error
TC19: input {} → output { error: "baseDamage is required" } // missing params
TC20: input { baseDamage:100, fireRate:2, weaponType:undefined, isCritical:false } → output { error: "weaponType is required" }
TC21: input { baseDamage:100, fireRate:2, weaponType:"physical", isCritical:undefined } → output { error: "isCritical is required" }
